CommunityApplications.Profile:
Self-hosted reading tools by **felixapel**.
Currently maintained: **CWA eBook Translate** — bilingual reading for [Calibre-Web-Automated](https://github.com/crocodilestick/Calibre-Web-Automated). Translate ebooks paragraph-by-paragraph *while you read*, in 100+ languages, using your own local LLM (Ollama / vLLM / LM Studio) or any major cloud API. Proxy-injection install: your CWA container stays 100% stock — no template mounts, no modifications, survives CWA updates. GPL-3.0, no telemetry, no subscription.
**Support:** bugs → [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/felixapel/CWA-eBook-Translate-Plugin/issues), questions → [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/felixapel/CWA-eBook-Translate-Plugin/discussions).
CommunityApplications.DonateText: If this plugin saved you a translation subscription, consider supporting development
